metadata.title: RabbitCT: a C-arm cone-beam CT benchmark dataset (post-mortem rabbit)
metadata.description:
Archival re-release of the RabbitCT benchmark dataset: an open platform for benchmarking 3-D cone-beam CT backprojection algorithms on a single high-resolution C-arm CT scan of a post-mortem rabbit. The original challenge website (www5.cs.fau.de) is no longer online; this copy is published with the authors' agreement to keep the benchmark available.

Contents: rabbitct_512.rctd and rabbitct_1024.rctd (496 projections plus calibrated 3×4 projection matrices, for 512³ and 1024³ reconstruction targets), reference_256.vol (256³ float32 reference reconstruction), and the developer kit (rabbitct_develop.zip: data structure header, CMake project, and the LolaBunny example backprojection module). See README_data.md for the file format and geometry.

Ethics: post-mortem acquisition; no live-animal procedure.

Please cite: Rohkohl C, Keck B, Hofmann HG, Hornegger J. Technical Note: RabbitCT — an open platform for benchmarking 3D cone-beam reconstruction algorithms. Medical Physics 36(9):3940–3944, 2009. doi:10.1118/1.3180956
metadata.notes: Original RabbitCT challenge organized by the Pattern Recognition Lab, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg. Re-released under CC BY 4.0 with the authors' agreement.
